userStories.title: Character Creation Scene - Weapon & Save
userStories.description:
Add weapon selection and character save functionality to CharacterCreationScene.ts

Acceptance Criteria:
- List all 4 weapons with their stats (power, agility, range) displayed
- Visual highlight indicates selected weapon
- 'Save' button present
- Save button disabled if: name invalid OR points not spent OR no weapon selected
- Save calls CharacterStorageService.save() with complete character data
- After successful save, return to MenuScene
- Edit mode: pre-fill all fields (name, attributes, weapon) if character passed as parameter
- E2E tests pass (minimum 4 scenarios)

userStories.title: Menu Scene - Character Slots UI
userStories.description:
Replace party size selector with 4 character slots in MenuScene.ts

Acceptance Criteria:
- Remove existing 'Party Size' selector UI
- Display 4 slots arranged horizontally
- Empty slot displays '+' or 'Empty' placeholder
- Filled slot displays: character name + first letter + attribute summary
- Click empty slot → opens character selection popup
- Click filled slot → opens popup for change/remove options
- 'Start Battle' button disabled if no characters selected
- E2E tests pass (minimum 4 scenarios)

userStories.title: Menu Scene - Character Selection Popup
userStories.description:
Create CharacterSelectionPopup.ts component for selecting characters in slots

Acceptance Criteria:
- Modal popup displays list of all saved characters
- Each entry shows: name, attribute summary (STR/DEX/MND/SPR), weapon
- Default characters visually marked (e.g., lock icon)
- Already selected characters grayed out (non-selectable)
- 'Create New' button navigates to CharacterCreationScene
- 'Remove' button appears when editing existing slot
- Select character → closes popup, fills slot
- Click outside popup or X button → closes without changes
- E2E tests pass (minimum 5 scenarios)

userStories.title: Character Management View
userStories.description:
Create CharacterManagementPanel.ts for managing saved characters

Acceptance Criteria:
- 'Manage Characters' button in MenuScene
- Panel displays all characters with full details
- 'Edit' button for custom characters → CharacterCreationScene (edit mode)
- 'Delete' button for custom characters (disabled if in current party)
- Delete confirmation dialog ('Delete X ?')
- Default characters: no Edit/Delete buttons
- 'Export All' button → downloads JSON file with all characters
- 'Import' button → loads JSON file, merges with existing characters
- E2E tests pass (minimum 5 scenarios)

userStories.title: Battle Integration - Bead Bag from Attributes
userStories.description:
Modify BattleBuilder.ts to create characters with bead bags based on their attributes

Acceptance Criteria:
- BattleBuilder receives list of CharacterData instead of partySize
- Character entity stores: name, attributes (str/dex/mnd/spr), weaponId
- PlayerBeadSystem initialized with composition based on attributes
- Character with STR=5,DEX=2,MND=2,SPR=3 → bead bag of 5 red, 2 green, 2 blue, 3 white
- Draw 3 beads at battle start (unchanged)
- Unit tests pass (minimum 6 scenarios)

userStories.title: Battle UI - Character Names Display
userStories.description:
Display character names in combat UI (HeroSelectionBar, SelectedHeroPanel, CharacterVisual)

Acceptance Criteria:
- HeroSelectionBar: character name visible on each hero card
- SelectedHeroPanel: character name displayed at top when hero selected
- CharacterVisual: token on grid shows first letter of character name (instead of 'P1', 'P2', etc.)
- Player colors (P1-P4) preserved for visual distinction
- E2E tests pass (minimum 3 scenarios)

userStories.title: Final Integration & Polish
userStories.description:
Complete integration testing and final polish of character creation system

Acceptance Criteria:
- Complete flow works: Menu → Create Character → Select Characters → Battle
- Default characters usable immediately on first launch
- Import/Export functionality works correctly
- All unit tests pass
- All E2E tests pass
- No regressions in existing functionality
- 'npm run check' passes without errors (typecheck + lint + format)
